flashcards.definition: The biogeochemical cycle by which carbon is exchanged among the biosphere, geosphere, hydrosphere, and atmosphere.
The cycle of nitrogen conversion: fixation → nitrification → assimilation → denitrification.
Continuous movement of water: evaporation → condensation → precipitation → runoff.
Movement of phosphorus through the lithosphere, hydrosphere, and biosphere (no gas phase).
The pathway by which a chemical element moves through biotic and abiotic parts of an ecosystem.
